svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="d1" id="d1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-192" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1160" pageHeight="680" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="REQ" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="租户请求
tenantId=1024" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SVC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="ChatService" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="220" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FAC" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="TenantChatModelFactory
getOrCreate(tenantId)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DEC" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="缓存命中?
computeIfAbsent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="82" width="150" x="640" y="44" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_BUILD" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="未命中 · createForTenant 四步构建" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="900" x="40" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="tenant_ai_config
getRawConfig" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="190" x="56" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AES" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="AesEncryptor
解密 api_key" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="190" x="266" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DEF" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="DEFAULTS
供应商兜底" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="190" x="476" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NEW" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="OpenAiChatModel.builder
新建实例" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="686" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CACHE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="ConcurrentHashMap
写入缓存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="640" y="356" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="HIT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="直接返回缓存的
ChatModel 实例" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="860" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LLM" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="OpenAiChatModel
DeepSeek / GLM / Qwen" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="860" y="356" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_EVICT" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="配置变更旁路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="900" x="40" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EVICT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="evict tenantId
清掉缓存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="640" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="REQ" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;" target="SVC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="SVC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" target="FAC" value="getOrCreate"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="FAC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;" target="DEC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="DEC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" target="HIT" value="命中"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="DEC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" target="DB" value="未命中"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="DB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;" target="AES"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E7" edge="1" parent="1" source="AES" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;" target="DEF"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E8" edge="1" parent="1" source="DEF" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;" target="NEW"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E9" edge="1" parent="1" source="NEW" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;" target="CACHE"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E10" edge="1" parent="1" source="CACHE" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;" target="HIT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E11" edge="1" parent="1" source="HIT" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;endArrow=block;" target="LLM"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E12" edge="1" parent="1" source="SVC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;" target="EVICT" value="配置变更"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E13" edge="1" parent="1" source="EVICT" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;dashed=1;endArrow=block;" target="DEC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
